dict.string: Nudge AI asks your terminal app which tab is currently focused so it can offer that tab as the default target when sending a prompt.
Nudge AI listens to your voice when you press the microphone button on an instruction field, so you can dictate instead of type.
Nudge AI captures the screen regions you highlight so it can attach them to your instructions.
Nudge AI transcribes the audio you dictate into the instruction field. On Apple Silicon this happens on-device; on older Macs the audio is sent to Apple for transcription.
